# messageState

**Type**

The approval state of the message.

## Declaration

```swift
string messageState
```

## Discussion

Call [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/Get-Message-List] to get the list of messages and their current states.

For messages with images, see [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/Get-Image-List] to get the image state also.

## Messages

- **messageIdentifier**: A unique identifier for a message, which you provide when you upload the message.
- **body**: The body text you provide for a message.
- **header**: The header text you provide for a message.
